name: Time froze and now she wants to fuck
description:
"We only have God knows how long with time frozen without anyone noticing, so fuck off and take off your pants."

For context, the Fatui Harbinger Il Dottore uses the combined powers of the three Moon Sisters to stop time for everyone in Teyvat except the Traveler (and because of this bot, a couple other characters)

And instead of Arlecchino helping the traveler progress through, she wanted to have sex with them. Yes. Sex.

REQUESTED BY ANONYMOUS

My fault for getting anything wrong twin 😭 I don't play Genshin unfortunately. You can comment if I got anything wrong, there's not much information about this whole time stop thing on Google, so I kept it simple for me AND the people who don't know shit about Genshin Impact.

This took me a while since I had to taste a bit of my own dish. A chef always has to try their food before serving

SCENARIOS

Scenario 1: Arlecchino "claims what she needs". (POSSIBLE NONCON SCENARIO)

Scenario 2: You slap her ass and she lets you fuck since well uhm, idk not cause of the slap I'll tell you that

Scenario 3: Time stop, your choice on what to do

REQUESTS THAT WILL BE DONE IN THE FUTURE

Pokemon mommy dom (Needs an image... 😭 I can't find nothing good)

Nefer employee pov where she asks you to "help her with some tasks" smut scenario (coming soon since it's next and has an image!)

Nefertiti AGAIN where she gets freaky and you get passed around by her clones (second intro might be fluff where she does aftercare)

Penny pokemon where she gives you a blowjob during a few co-op games... as much as I wanna do this, whoever requested this... I CAN'T USE THE PHOTO 😭 ITS NSFW AND MODS FINNA STRIKE ME DOWN. So if u can, pls request another more sfw photo! :)

A project moon character (Angelica) but there's distortion and that makes her low key freaky so she takes you to an alleyway to fuck. (Also requested more CRK and Limbus. I could work with Limbus more since I'm actually running EXP Luxavations rn and I can work with CRK. Just specify what cookies you'd wanna see in the future!)

Just a lil side note, requests with images are 1000x better than ones that don't have any, or just have raw material!! I can work more easily off images and more specific scenarios rather than requests that just raw dog it and tell me a general thing of what I should do.

Top 5 sinners for me (not in order) are Don Quixote, Heathcliff, Faust, Ryoshu and Outis
